toast.source: Parsed from Toast group Daily Performance Summary email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Monday, June 1', no-reply@toasttab.com). Detailed per-location daily (with SDLW + 4-wk comparisons) not yet delivered at the 7 AM run; arrives midday.

Discounts 5.3% of gross (~$106.42 derived). 1 void item, $0 refunds, $0 gift cards. 36 card payments.
